title: Revised for 2nd substitute: Concerning the management of individuals who are placed in juvenile rehabilitation institutions.
summary: Revised for 2nd substitute: Concerning the management of individuals who are placed in juvenile rehabilitation institutions.

actions.action: First reading, referred to Human Services.
Public hearing in the Senate Committee on Human Services at 1:30 PM.
Executive session scheduled, but no action was taken in the Senate Committee on Human Services at 8:00 AM.
Executive action taken in the Senate Committee on Human Services at 1:30 PM.
HS - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
And refer to Ways & Means.
Minority; without recommendation.
Referred to Ways & Means.
Public hearing in the Senate Committee on Ways & Means at 1:30 PM.
Executive action taken in the Senate Committee on Ways & Means at 1:30 PM.
WM - Majority; 2nd substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
Minority; without recommendation.
Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
2nd substitute bill substituted
Floor amendment
Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
Third reading, passed; yeas, 49; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 0.
First reading, referred to Early Learning & Human Services.
Public hearing in the House Committee on Early Learning & Human Services at 1:30 PM.
Executive action taken in the House Committee on Early Learning & Human Services at 1:30 PM.
ELHS - Majority; do pass with amendment
Minority; do not pass.
Minority; without recommendation.
Referred to Appropriations.
Public hearing in the House Committee on Appropriations at 9:00 AM.
Executive action taken in the House Committee on Appropriations at 1:30 PM.
APP - Majority; do pass with amendment
Referred to Rules 2 Review.
Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
By resolution, returned to Senate Rules Committee for third reading.
By resolution, reintroduced and retained in present status.
Senate Rules "X" file.

votes.description: Senate Committee on Human Services: 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass
Senate Committee on Ways & Means: 2nd substitute bill be substituted, do pass
House Committee on Early Learning & Human Services: do pass with amendment(s)
House Committee on Appropriations: do pass with amendment(s) but without amendment(s) by Early Learning & Human Services
